Text.Main: You are not recognized as a home owner!  You must have your Tocado Studio Apartment key in your inventory to use the Home Upgrade Terminal.

Home Upgrade Terminal
-----------------------------
Your [$npc]Home Upgrade Terminal[$/npc] ([$emote]HUT[$/emote]) can be used to add professionally designed upgrades and decorations to your home.  

To upgrade your home simply open the HUT upgrade catalog and purchase an upgrade kit.  Once you have an upgrade kit you can use the HUT to install the upgrades into your home.

Would you like to access the [$imp]Upgrade Catalog[$/imp] or [$imp]Install Upgrades[$/imp] now?
-----------------------------

Home Upgrade Terminal
-----------------------------
Your inventory has been scanned and all detected upgrades have been installed.
-----------------------------

Your upgrade kits, including your apartment key, have been detected and converted into permanent items that take up no inventory.  They can be viewed on the Achievements panel if you wish to inspect them.

[$emote]This model was made from fragments of the Pike Boss Mozak's car after it was destroyed in a battle at the Temple Mountain Monastery.  There is a note attached to the bottom of the model that reads:[$/emote]  

Congratulations on completing the Rites of Ascension, Warrior.

--Darius, 
   Keeper of the flame, Temple Mountain

Hestia Upgrade Terminal
-----------------------------
Your [$npc]Hestia Upgrade Terminal[$/npc] ([$emote]HUT[$/emote]) can be used to add professionally designed upgrades and decorations to your home.  

To upgrade your home simply open the HUT upgrade catalog and purchase an upgrade kit.  Once you have an upgrade kit you can use the HUT to install the upgrades into your home.

Would you like to access the [$imp]Upgrade Catalog[$/imp] or [$imp]Install Upgrades[$/imp] now?
-----------------------------
You are not recognized as a registered keyholder.  You must have your Hestia Upside Hostel key in your inventory to use the Home Upgrade Terminal.

Home Upgrade Terminal
-----------------------------
Your inventory has been scanned and all detected upgrades have been installed.
-----------------------------
